overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic city street that transitions from clear weather to a heavy orange dust storm. The player walks along sidewalks under elevated highways, passes neon signs and street vendors, and ends by approaching a building entrance with teal neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red bike lane between two elevated highway structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink top and white shorts walking toward camera
futuristic white car driving along the street

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with green railings running parallel to the street
dark elevated highway structure with neon signs underneath
tall white and black tower with geometric patterns visible in the distance
large digital screens displaying advertisements on building facades
distinctive red paved lane separating sidewalk from vehicle road

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city street with clear blue skies. The path runs between two massive elevated highway structures with a red bike lane in the center. Neon billboards and palm trees line the street while futuristic vehicles drive by and pedestrians in cyberpunk fashion walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with graffiti wall during dust storm

events.description: weather suddenly shifts from clear blue sky to heavy orange dust storm reducing visibility
camera turns right to focus on wall with neon graffiti reading EAT THE RICH

agents.ego_description: pausing to examine the neon graffiti on the wall amidst the dust storm

entered.detail: black wall with colorful neon graffiti spelling EAT THE RICH in pink, blue, and orange letters
pile of concrete debris and rocks against the wall

segments.scene_description: The weather transitions abruptly to a heavy orange dust storm. The camera turns toward a wall featuring prominent neon graffiti reading EAT THE RICH. The visibility drops significantly as dust fills the air, and the surrounding environment becomes obscured by the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty sidewalk with street vendors under elevated highway

events.description: resumes walking forward along the sidewalk through the dust storm
passes street vendor stall with magazine rack and vending machine

agents.ego_description: walking through heavy orange dust past street vendors and vending machines

notable_agents.action: vendor in leather jacket standing by magazine rack looking at street
person in red jacket using vending machine

entered.detail: futuristic black vending machine with glowing interface
black metal rack displaying colorful magazines and merchandise
black garbage bags and scattered debris on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the heavy dust storm with visibility severely reduced. The path passes by a street vendor standing next to a magazine rack and a vending machine. The elevated highway structure looms overhead while palm trees are barely visible through the orange haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance alley with teal neon lighting

events.description: turns left and approaches building entrance with neon lighting
enters narrow covered alley between buildings with teal neon strip lights

agents.ego_description: turning toward a building entrance and entering a covered alleyway with neon lights

entered.detail: dark building facade with horizontal teal neon light strip running along the wall
pink and red vertical neon signs and posters on the building wall
narrow passage between buildings leading into a covered walkway

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the main street toward a building entrance. The camera approaches a structure with distinctive teal neon strip lighting and enters a narrow covered alleyway. The dust storm is partially blocked by the building structure, creating a more sheltered environment with mixed artificial and natural lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city street that transforms from a clear, sunny day into a suffocating orange dust storm. It begins with a walk under massive elevated highways beneath blue skies, passing neon billboards, palm trees, and pedestrians along a red bike lane. As the weather abruptly shifts, the camera turns toward a wall featuring neon graffiti reading EAT THE RICH while a thick orange haze rolls in, severely reducing visibility. The scene then pushes forward through the blinding storm, passing a street vendor and a vending machine as the overhead highway structures loom through the dust. Finally, the camera turns away from the main street to approach a building entrance marked by teal neon strip lighting, moving into a sheltered alleyway where the storm begins to fade.
